meta_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Antigravity Project Template to Solve Project Stagnation
content.seo_description: Stop abandoning your SaaS ideas. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to ship your MVP faster. A beginner-friendly founder's case study.
content.answer_block: Project stagnation stems from poor architecture and lack of momentum. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you standardize your stack, eliminate configuration fatigue, and use Claude Code to automate implementation. This workflow shifts your focus from boilerplate management to shipping features that drive recurring revenue for your business.
content.intro:
Your hard drive is a graveyard of half-baked repositories. You start with passion, but within 72 hours, the complexity of database schemas, authentication, and deployment pipelines crushes your momentum. The dream of a SaaS empire stalls out in a sea of dependency errors and 'TODO' comments.

The difference between a hobbyist and a founder isn't talent; it's a system. The Antigravity project template acts as your structural scaffolding, providing a battle-tested foundation that lets you bypass the 'blank page' problem. When paired with Claude Code, you stop fighting your IDE and start building products that actually convert users.

steps.title: Define the Value Proposition
steps.description: Before writing code, define the core mechanism that solves a user's pain. This prevents feature creep.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a CTO. Create a project architecture for a [Insert Idea] SaaS. Focus on a lean MVP with auth, Stripe integration, and a clean UI.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Initialize project scaffolding based on the Antigravity architecture for [Idea]'

steps.title: Configure the Antigravity Template
steps.description: Initialize your environment with the standard template to ensure consistent state management and API handling.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Setup the Antigravity template with standard boilerplate, including environment variables, database schema for users, and a base layout.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Pull the base Antigravity template and configure the environment files'

steps.title: Automate Database Schema
steps.description: Use the template's schema definitions to build your core data model instantly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Prisma schema for a SaaS platform with users, subscriptions, and projects. Use best practices for relational integrity.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Apply the schema to the database and generate the client'

steps.title: Rapid UI Component Generation
steps.description: Implement the core dashboard interface using pre-built Antigravity components to save design time.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a responsive dashboard component that displays user projects. Ensure it matches the Antigravity design system.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create the dashboard UI component and integrate it into the main layout'

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Ensure your MVP is live immediately to gather user feedback and validate your market hypothesis.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a deployment script for Vercel/Railway that includes environment variable validation and build checks.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Verify build integrity and generate deployment configuration'

pro_tips: Always build your landing page first; if you can't sell the idea, don't write the code.
Use Claude Code to write tests before features to ensure your MVP doesn't break as you scale.
Keep your database schema as simple as possible until you have your first 10 paying users.
Leverage the Antigravity template's built-in logging to track user behavior from day one.
Treat your MVP as a 'disposable' prototype; focus on speed, not perfection, until product-market fit is found.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, share the link in our community Slack to get your first 5 beta users and collect feedback.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your ideas die in a folder. You have the tools, the template, and the roadmap to ship a product that people will pay for. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
